title: Moist Australian Meat Pie
description: A classic Australian savory pie featuring seasoned ground beef and a flaky phyllo crust, suitable for diabetic-friendly diets. This recipe yields a rich and satisfying meal.
instructions: Mix ground beef, onion, carrots, celery, flour, egg, and milk in a bowl until well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Heat a pan over medium heat and cook the beef mixture until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Soak the phyllo sheets in warm water for 5 minutes.
Layer the phyllo sheets in a pie dish, brushing each sheet with melted butter.
Spoon the beef mixture into the center of the phyllo layers.
Top with another sheet of phyllo and brush with butter.
Sous-vide at 160F (71C) for 2 hours and 30 minutes.
Bake the pie for 20-25 minutes, or until the phyllo is golden brown.
Let the pie rest for 10 minutes before serving.
